title: Core pack expansion (03a): restructure to internal/packs/core/ + full rule inventory
description:
Expand the core packs to match plan 03a-packs-core.md. This task establishes the pattern all other pack tasks will follow.

1. **Restructure**: Move from flat internal/packs/defaults.go to internal/packs/core/git.go and internal/packs/core/filesystem.go using the new matcher DSL from task 1.

2. **Implement full rule inventory**: Plan specifies 11 safe + 20 destructive git patterns and 4 safe + 12 destructive filesystem patterns. Current implementation has only 2 safe/1 destructive for git and 1 safe/1 destructive for filesystem.

3. **Golden files**: Create internal/eval/testdata/golden/core_git.txt and core_filesystem.txt with per-pattern test vectors.

4. **Per-pattern unit tests**: Add comprehensive tests for each rule using ExtractedCommand inputs.

This is the PATTERN-SETTING task — later pack tasks (03b-03g) should follow the same structure established here.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implemented core pack expansion and related parser/corpus updates in commit 94fe23b. Push blocked in this runtime (git auth/uid issue), scheduler and reviewer notified with local hash. Remaining known failures are allocation budgets (tracked for c9c.9) and existing database env-escalation golden mismatches.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 94fe23b. Core git/filesystem packs expanded.
